dialogue_text: There is, there must be some way, and John Carter, who has fought his way through a strange world for love of you, will find it.
source_excerpt: "It shall not be, my princess," I cried. "There is, there must be some way, and John Carter, who has fought his way through a strange world for love of you, will find it."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: A flier, Jeddak! Quick! Order your swiftest flier to the palace top. I can save Barsoom yet.
source_excerpt: "A flier, Jeddak! Quick! Order your swiftest flier to the palace top. I can save Barsoom yet."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.
